formal_proof_artifacts.role: geometric tail formula for occupation-number refined N-grid (N=2,3,4 at fixed K=2,3)

theorem_content.abstract: The occupation-refined certificate uses a refined N grid (N=2,3,4) at fixed K values. The geometric tail formula is proved. The N-tail improves at K=3 (occupation_tail_improved_at_k3=True) and is small compared to K-tail (occupation_tail_small_vs_k_tail=True). The K-tail remains the bottleneck.
theorem_content.honest_failure: status=failed_k_tail_after_occupation_refinement. The K-tail does not yet meet the target even after occupation refinement.
